label:
肆季鬼志效果
Season of Ghosts Effects

Effect: Blessed Coins.name: 效果：祝福钱币 Effect: Blessed Coins
Effect: Blessed Coins.description:
来自三个不同神祇的三枚受祝福钱币，被放入长明灯中以保持其燃烧。每枚钱币都会给予一项技能 +1 物品加值。编辑该规则元素，以根据所选神祇设置合适的技能。

Three blessed coins from three separate deities, placed in the Eternal Lantern to keep it lit. Each coin gives a +1 item bonus to a skill. Edit the rule element to set appropriate skills from chosen deities.

Effect: Mirage Mist.name: 效果：蜃景雾 Effect: Mirage Mist
Effect: Mirage Mist.description:
在蜃景雾内进行的所有察觉检定因此承受–1状态减值，而辨别方向的求生检定DC全部提高5。

All Perception checks attempted within mirage mist suffer a –1 status penalty as a result, and all DCs for Survival checks to Sense Direction are increased by 5.

Effect: Field of Past Regrets.name: 效果：前尘憾事气场 Effect: Field of Past Regrets
Effect: Field of Past Regrets.description:
由@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.season-of-ghosts-bestiary.Actor.ExTKQvgLI72XGk98]{辛月}的前尘憾事气场赋予。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.season-of-ghosts-bestiary.Actor.ExTKQvgLI72XGk98]{Xin Yue}'s aura Field of Past Regrets

Effect: Lantern.name: 效果：提灯 Effect: Lantern
Effect: Lantern.description:
对猩红月光的豁免骰获得 +2 物品加值。

+2 item bonus to saving throws against the crimson moonlight.

Effect: Aura of Forgetfulness.name: 效果：健忘灵光 Effect: Aura of Forgetfulness
Effect: Aura of Forgetfulness.description:
由@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.season-of-ghosts-bestiary.Actor.QCTOHTwnEo6eq82T]{爱怛魔}的健忘灵光赋予。

Granted by the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.season-of-ghosts-bestiary.Actor.QCTOHTwnEo6eq82T]{Ijda}'s Aura of Forgetfulness.
